headline: Amazon Falls 4% as Senate China Probe and AI-Spending Jitters Weigh Ahead of Earnings
summary: A Senate China probe, AI spending fears, and fresh layoffs are hitting Amazon stock just one week before a quarter that Wall Street expects to be strong. Something does not add up, and earnings may force a reckoning either way.

headline: The Gig Economy 2026 Published, Profiles Over 75 Market Leaders, Including Airbnb, eBay, and Uber
summary: Opportunities span eight segments: accommodations, delivery, freelance and professional services, online marketplaces, peer-to-peer lending, resource sharing, and ride sharing.
